sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 64

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 64:1
items.html: (to the question) For ZON [Zeir Anpin and Nukva] must then rise as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to AVI [Aba ve Ima] to receive the illumination of the Zivug [coupling] that lowers the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from the Eynaim [eyes] of the Nukva. And then the Mochin of ZA depart and rise to AVI as MAN. (Item 109)
